hero.headline: Premium Fish Maw, Nourishing Tradition
hero.subheadline: Carefully sourced fish maw from the world's finest origins, delivering generations of wellness

home.featuredSubtitle: Hand-picked premium fish maw for every occasion
home.brandStoryBody: With over two decades in the fish maw trade, we source directly from the Philippines, Indonesia, India and South Africa. Our expert team personally inspects every batch, upholding strict quality standards and traditional sun-drying methods that preserve the natural nutrients fish maw has been prized for throughout Chinese culinary tradition.
home.pillar1Body: Direct sourcing from the world's finest fishing grounds ensures purity and freshness in every piece
home.pillar2Body: Time-honoured sun-drying techniques that lock in natural collagen and nutrients at their peak
home.pillar3Body: Transparent grading by size, thickness and origin — so you always know exactly what you're buying
home.pillar4Body: Over 20 years of customer trust. Every buyer is our best testament to uncompromising quality

productDetail.storageText: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. For longer storage, place in a sealed bag and refrigerate for up to 1–2 years.
